Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */

Event Start //PedNroNfeAut //RetornaNfePedido.udp(EmpCod,PedFatFilCod,PedCod) LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod &FilCod.Clear() if &Context.FilialLancamento.Count > 1 for &FilialLancamento in &Context.FilialLancamento For Each ORder EmpCod, FilCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilialLancamento.PesFilAce Where FilTip = FIlialTipo.VENDA_AMBULANTE //Exclusivo Venda AMbulante &FilCod.AddItem(&FilialLancamento.PesFilAce, substr(&FilialLancamento.PesFilRaz,1,20) ) EndFor EndFor Else &FilCod.AddItem(&Context.FilCod, &Context.FilRaz) tbFilialLancamento.Visible = 0 Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &EmpCod.Visible = False Grid.Rows = Page.Rows &PedSts = nullvalue(&PedSts) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = ' Lançamento Pedidos' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' &OrderedBy.Clear() &OrderedBy.AddItem(1, 'Ped.Decresc.') &OrderedBy.AddItem(2, 'Pedido') &OrderedBy.AddItem(3, 'Emissão') &OrderedBy.AddItem(4, 'Líquido ') If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &OrderedDsc.Visible = False &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ If &PedDtaEms_To.IsEmpty() and &PedDtaEms.IsEmpty() &PedDtaEms_To = serverdate() &PedDtaEms = &PedDtaEms_To - 30 EndIF EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &NewUpdate = !'' &comboAcoes.Clear() &comboAcoes.AddItem(0, 'WWP_ActionGroupCaption') &comboAcoes.AddItem(1, 'Emitir NFe') &comboAcoes.AddItem(2, 'Críticas Pedido') If (LctTip = TipoLancamento.RemessaSaida) &comboAcoes.AddItem(3, 'Gerar Retorno') Endif &comboAcoes.AddItem(4, 'Cancelar Remessa') &ImprimirPedido = !'' if PedCliCodRaz_Nov.Length() > 30 &PedCliCodRaz_Nov = substr(PedCliCodRaz_Nov, 1, 30) + '...' Else &PedCliCodRaz_Nov = PedCliCodRaz_Nov EndIf &NovoStatusFinanceiro = trim(PedNovStsFinNom) &AuxEst = UPPER(Substr(PedSts.EnumerationDescription(), 1,3)) If PedStsFinIsPar = true &AuxFin = 'PAR.' Else &AuxFin = UPPER(Substr(PedStsFin.EnumerationDescription(), 1,3)) Endif &Operacao = substr(LctCodNom,1 , 30) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &OrderedBy.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &comboAcoes.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case &comboAcoes = 1 Do 'Do EmitirNFe' Case &comboAcoes = 2 Do 'Do Criticaspedido' Case &comboAcoes = 3 Do 'Do GerarRetorno' Case &comboAcoes = 4 Do 'Do Cancelarremessa' EndCase &comboAcoes = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Criticaspedido_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = WcCriticasDoPedido.Create(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoNovoAgrupamento' wpMontarPedidoVendaAmbulante.Popup() Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'Dosdd' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ wpLocalizaNotaPedido.PopUp(&EmpCod, &FilCod) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do EmitirNFe' GravaNotaTemporariaVenda.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, '55') wpSelecionaProdutosnFe.Link('WPREMESSAAMBULANTE', EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Criticaspedido' // wpCriticasPedido.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Criticaspedido_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do GerarRetorno' wpGerarRetornoRemessa.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Cancelarremessa' // If PedSts <> Status_Pedido.ABERTO // msg('Somente Pedidos Abertos podem ser Cancelados!') // Else // &AutNiv = RetornaAutorizacao.UDP('VENDACANCELARPEDIDO', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1) // RetornaIsPodeAlterar.Call('', EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, &IsAutorizado) // // If &AutNiv > 0 // if &IsAutorizado = true wpCancelarPedidoVenda.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) Refresh // Else // msg('Você não tem acesso para alterar Excluir Pedido nesse Status!') // EndIF // else // msg('Usuário Não Autorizado a Rotina de Cancelar Pedido de Venda. [VENDACANCELARPEDIDO]') // endif // EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDCOD" &PedCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDSTS" &PedSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FILCOD" &FilCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDDTAEMS" &PedDtaEms.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) &PedDtaEms_To.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.ValueTo) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"LCTTIP" &LctTip.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDCOD", "", not &PedCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDSTS", "", not &PedSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedSts, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"FILCOD", "", not &FilCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &FilCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDDTAEMS", "", not (&PedDtaEms.IsEmpty() AND &PedDtaEms_To.IsEmpty()), 0, &PedDtaEms.ToString().Trim(), &PedDtaEms_To.ToString().Trim()) WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"LCTTIP", "", not &LctTip.IsEmpty(), 0, &LctTip, '') &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"Pedido" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event &ImprimirPedido.Click wpImprimirPedidoVenda.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) EndEvent Event &NewUpdate.Click wpSelecionarFaturar_capa.Link('WPREMESSAAMBULANTE', EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) EndEvent

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
